title: Announcements banner
excerpt:

posts.author: KColosiPCCI (Kristen Colosi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would like the ability to add time parameters around how long a banner can display. (ie, day, week, month, specific time period).

Would like the ability to pre-schedule banners to post during a time period versus just having one line to fill in at a time.
